mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ORDER (ORDER_NO, ORDER_TYPE, ACCT_CD, ORDER_DATE, STATUS, REMARK) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{acctCd}, NOW(), 'WAIT', #{remark})
INSERT INTO TB_ORDER_DETAIL (ORDER_NO, ITEM_CD, QTY, UNIT_PRICE, AMT) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{itemCd}, #{qty}, #{unitPrice}, CAST(#{qty} AS UNSIGNED) * CAST(#{unitPrice} AS UNSIGNED))
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(ORDER_NO, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NO LIKE CONCAT('PO-', #{dateStr}, '%')
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(ORDER_NO, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NO LIKE CONCAT('SO-', #{dateStr}, '%')
SELECT ORDER_NO as orderNo, ACCT_CD as acctCd, STATUS as status, ORDER_DATE as orderDate FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDER_TYPE = 'BUY' ORDER BY ORDER_DATE DESC
SELECT ORDER_NO as orderNo, ACCT_CD as acctCd, STATUS as status, ORDER_DATE as orderDate FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDER_TYPE = 'SELL' ORDER BY ORDER_DATE DESC

SELECT A.ORDER_NO, A.ACCT_CD, A.ORDER_DATE, A.STATUS, A.REMARK, B.ITEM_CD, B.QTY, B.UNIT_PRICE, B.AMT FROM TB_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_DETAIL B ON A.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO WHERE A.ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ORDER SET STATUS = #{status} WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_CD AS itemCd, ITEM_NM AS itemNm, STOCK_QTY AS stockQty, PRICE AS price FROM TB_ITEM WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ITEM_LOG ( ITEM_CD, INOUT_TYPE, QTY, BEFORE_QTY, AFTER_QTY, REF_NO, EMP_ID ) SELECT #{itemCd}, 'IN', #{qty}, STOCK_QTY - #{qty}, STOCK_QTY, #{orderNo}, #{empId} FROM TB_ITEM WHERE ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}
mapper.select: SELECT A.ORDER_NO AS orderNo, A.ORDER_DATE AS orderDate, A.ACCT_CD AS acctCd, A.STATUS AS status, B.ITEM_CD AS itemCd, B.QTY AS qty, B.UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice, B.AMT AS amt FROM TB_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_DETAIL B ON A.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO WHERE ORDER_TYPE = 'SELL'

SELECT A.ORDER_NO AS orderNo, A.ORDER_DATE AS orderDate, A.ACCT_CD AS acctCd, A.STATUS AS status, B.ITEM_CD AS itemCd, B.QTY AS qtY, B.UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice, B.AMT AS amT, (SELECT SUM(BOM.REQ_QTY * I.PRICE) FROM TB_BOM BOM JOIN TB_ITEM I ON BOM.CHILD_CD = I.ITEM_CD WHERE BOM.PARENT_CD = B.ITEM_CD AND BOM.USE_YN = 'Y') AS bomCost FROM TB_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_DETAIL B ON A.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO WHERE ORDER_TYPE = 'BUY'

SELECT P.PERF_DATE AS perfDate, P.GOOD_QTY AS goodQty, P.BAD_QTY AS badQty, P.BAD_REASON AS badReason, C.ITEM_NM AS itemNm, C.ITEM_CD AS itemCd, C.PRICE AS price, (P.BAD_QTY * C.PRICE) AS lossAmt FROM TB_WORK_PERF P LEFT JOIN TB_WORK_ORDER W ON P.WORK_NO = W.WORK_NO LEFT JOIN TB_ITEM C ON W.ITEM_CD = C.ITEM_CD WHERE C.ITEM_CD IS NOT NULL
SELECT P.WORK_NO AS workNo, P.PERF_DATE AS perfDate, P.GOOD_QTY AS goodQty, P.BAD_QTY AS badQty, W.ITEM_CD AS itemCd FROM TB_WORK_PERF P LEFT JOIN TB_WORK_ORDER W ON P.WORK_NO = W.WORK_NO
SELECT ITEM_CD AS itemCd, ITEM_NM AS itemNm, PRICE AS price, STOCK_QTY AS stockQty FROM TB_ITEM WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT B.PARENT_CD AS itemCd, B.CHILD_CD AS childItemCd, B.REQ_QTY AS qty, I.PRICE AS unitPrice, B.REG_DT AS costDate FROM TB_BOM B LEFT JOIN TB_ITEM I ON B.CHILD_CD = I.ITEM_CD
